$comment: Committed project config for the brand brain. Travels with the repo: clone it into a Claude Code cloud instance and the craft-loading hook + routine skills are live immediately. Personal/instance-specific overrides (MCP server connections, model, theme) belong in .claude/settings.local.json, which is gitignored. See .claude/README.md for the full routines model.

hooks.command: echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"UserPromptSubmit\",\"additionalContext\":\"The base Claude harness knows nothing about creative strategy. Treat all creative-strategy reasoning as ungrounded until you load the relevant creative-strategy-context docs per the routing table in CLAUDE.md. Load them before answering and ground every insight in them, so the output reads like a senior creative strategist rather than a model summarizing files. Use the vault hard and honor the brand hard rules.\"}}"
